# Химия без магии — Chemistry Without Magic

> Adaptive chemistry learning platform for OGE/EGE/GCSE/Matura/EBAU exam preparation.
> All 118 elements, interactive periodic table, bond types, oxidation states, stoichiometry calculations, reaction classification. Free, no login required. Available in Russian, English, Polish, Spanish.

## Periodic Table & Elements

- [Periodic Table (interactive)](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/)
- [Hydrogen H](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/H/)
- [Oxygen O](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/O/)
- [Carbon C](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/C/)
- [Nitrogen N](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/N/)
- [Sodium Na](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Na/)
- [Chlorine Cl](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Cl/)
- [Iron Fe](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Fe/)
- [Copper Cu](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Cu/)
- [Gold Au](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Au/)
- [Calcium Ca](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Ca/)
- [Aluminium Al](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Al/)
- [Silicon Si](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/Si/)
- [Phosphorus P](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/P/)
- [Sulfur S](https://ru.chemistry.online/periodic-table/S/)

## Theory Modules

- [Chemical Bonds & Crystal Lattices](https://ru.chemistry.online/bonds/)
- [Oxidation States (step-by-step)](https://ru.chemistry.online/oxidation-states/)
- [Stoichiometry Calculations](https://ru.chemistry.online/calculations/)
- [Chemical Reactions](https://ru.chemistry.online/reactions/)
- [Substance Classification](https://ru.chemistry.online/substances/)

## Substances & Ions Reference

- [Solubility Table & Ion Reference](https://ru.chemistry.online/ions/)
- [Substance Catalog](https://ru.chemistry.online/substances/)

## Exam Preparation (OGE, EGE, GCSE, Matura)

- [Adaptive Diagnostics](https://ru.chemistry.online/diagnostics/)
- [Exam Practice (OGE)](https://ru.chemistry.online/exam/)
- [Competency Profile](https://ru.chemistry.online/profile/)
- [All Competencies](https://ru.chemistry.online/competencies/)
